sa:items.rdfs:label: Outer Tactical Vest
sa:items.sa:description: The bread and butter armor for most modern armies
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Integrated communication gear lets user communicate without any external gear

sa:items.rdfs:label: Undercover vest
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Gain advantage when trying to conceal that you are wearing armor

sa:items.rdfs:label: Boarding shield
sa:items.sa:description: Large hand held shield used in boarding actions. Shields the user from area of effect effects.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: +2 on reflex saves vs AoE effects

sa:items.rdfs:label: Outer Tactical exoskeleton
sa:items.sa:description: The bread and butter armor for most modern armies, with a little extra.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Integrated communication gear lets user communicate without any external gear. "Google Glass" like functionality.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Scale mail armor
sa:items.sa:description: Armor made from overlapping metal scales

sa:items.rdfs:label: Full plate
sa:items.sa:description: Full plate mail covering most of the wearer, usually made to order to fit a spesific individual

sa:items.rdfs:label: Leather armor
sa:items.sa:description: A light armor made from cured leather

sa:items.rdfs:label: "Dragon" Scale
sa:items.sa:description: A light armor made from modern day materials.

sa:items.rdfs:label: "Dragon" Plate
sa:items.sa:description: A plate armor made from modern day materials. Covers most of the torso leaving the extremities free.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasteel shield
sa:items.sa:description: Modern materials for an archaic purpose. A classic shield made with spaceage materials

sa:items.rdfs:label: Heavy shield
sa:items.sa:description: The classic, made from wood or metal.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light shield
sa:items.sa:description: The lighter classic, made from wood or metall.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tower shield
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Advantage on reflex saves  versus aoe effects. - 10 movespeed

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasteel towershield
sa:items.sa:description: A high tech version of the towering classic
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Advantage on reflex saves  versus aoe effects -5 movespeed
